title: Who Will Adapt Best to AI Disruption?

mentions.quoted_text: Gemini can now serve free, full-length practice exams on demand.

facts.fact_value: free full-length practice SAT exams with instant feedback

mentions.quoted_text: Cheaper AI will drive up demand rather than lead to a market crash.
mentions.context_snippet: Nadella is a firm believer in Javon's paradox when it comes to AI, implying cheaper AI drives up demand.
mentions.review_reason: Spelling variant of Jevons paradox; classified as 'other'.

mentions.quoted_text: The study creates a novel measure called adaptive capacity to assess worker adaptability to AI disruption.

mentions.quoted_text: The study uses an AI exposure index to measure susceptibility of professions to disruption.
mentions.context_snippet: The authors combined the Adaptive Capacity Index with an AI exposure index to categorize jobs by vulnerability and adaptability.
